name: automated-class-schedular
description: Automated Class Scheduler is a full-stack project for institute onboarding, department and subject management, and AI-assisted timetable generation.

scripts.start-all: concurrently "cd college-scheduler && mvnw.cmd spring-boot:run" "cd \"AI service\Time table generator\" && python -m uvicorn app:app --reload --port 8000" "cd frontend && npm run dev"
